common.tagline: Your intelligent legal counsel for Saudi Arabia

hero.title: The AI-native operating system for law firms
hero.subtitle: Research, draft, review contracts, and manage cases & clients — in a single, bilingual workspace, grounded in Saudi laws with traceable citations.

features.title: Everything your firm needs in one place
features.subtitle: One bilingual workspace that handles the legal work and runs the practice — so you stop juggling tools and start moving cases.

workbench.title: Research, draft, review — in one workspace
workbench.description: Ask in plain Arabic or English and get answers cited from Saudi statutes. Draft contracts, memos and POAs from Saudi-context templates, upload a document and surface risks in seconds, and analyse cases with strategy suggestions — every output grounded in a source you can verify in one click.
workbench.bullet1: Grounded research with Saudi statute citations
workbench.bullet2: Bilingual drafting, contract review & risk surfacing
workbench.bullet3: Case analysis with strategy and source links

operations.title: Run your whole practice from one inbox
operations.description: Connect your firm's WhatsApp and let the AI answer clients around the clock, qualify intakes, and escalate sensitive matters to you the moment they appear. Every conversation flows into a built-in CRM where clients, files, matters and deadlines live together.
operations.bullet2: Unified CRM: clients, files, matters & deadlines

hero.title: The complete operating system for a Saudi law firm
hero.subtitle: One bilingual workspace that researches, drafts, reviews, and runs your practice — grounded in Saudi statutes with citations you can verify in a click.

constellation.title: Six capabilities, one continuous workflow
constellation.subtitle: Each capability speaks to the next — citations carry into drafts, drafts carry into review, review carries into the client thread.

rag.title: Grounded legal research
rag.body: Ask in plain Arabic or English; get cited answers from Saudi statutes, your matters, and your firm's documents.

drafting.title: Document drafting
drafting.body: Saudi-context templates for NDAs, contracts, POAs, memos and demand letters — fully editable, version-tracked.

review.title: Contract review
review.body: Upload a draft; the agent surfaces risks, missing clauses, and rewrite suggestions in seconds.

case.title: Case analysis
case.body: Summarise case files, extract legal issues, and propose a strategy — every claim source-linked.

crm.title: Built-in client CRM
crm.body: Clients, files, matters and deadlines in one structured place, woven into every conversation.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp channel
whatsapp.body: Connect your firm's number; the AI replies 24/7, qualifies intakes, escalates to you when it matters.

workbench.title: Research, draft, review — in one workspace
workbench.body: Stop juggling tabs. Ask the assistant a question and watch it cite the right article, draft the matching clause, and flag the risk — without you leaving the thread. Every output is grounded in a verifiable Saudi source.

bullets.0: Inline citations to the Companies, Labor, Civil Transactions Law & more
bullets.1: Bilingual drafting (AR / EN) from Saudi-context templates
bullets.2: Risk surfacing with green / amber / red severity tags
bullets.3: Case analysis: issues, applicable rules, suggested strategy

operations.title: Run your whole practice from one inbox
operations.body: Plug in your firm's WhatsApp and the assistant handles intake around the clock — qualifying leads, opening matters in the CRM, and pinging you the moment a sensitive case lands. No one re-asks the client a thing.

bullets.1: Unified CRM: clients, files, matters & deadlines
bullets.2: 24/7 auto-intake with smart escalation to you
bullets.3: Full audit log on every conversation and decision

flow.title: From a client's first message to a signed PDF
flow.subtitle: Every step is logged, cited, and shareable with your team.

0.title: Client reaches out
0.body: A WhatsApp message arrives. The AI greets the client in their language and starts qualifying the matter.

1.title: Intent detected & matched
1.body: Intent is classified, the client is matched against the CRM, and a new matter is opened automatically.

2.title: Research & draft
2.body: The agent pulls the right statutes, drafts the document, and flags the risks for your review.

3.title: You decide & sign
3.body: You approve, edit, or push back. The signed PDF and a full change log are filed back into the matter.

compare.title: Replace seven tools with one bilingual workspace

3.old: You wake up — or you don't

bilingual.title: Built for the Kingdom, in your language
bilingual.body: Mostashari was trained on Saudi statutes from day one and speaks both Arabic and English natively. Switch mid-sentence — the answer follows.

compliance.title: Audit-ready by design
compliance.body: Your firm's data lives inside the Kingdom, every output carries a verifiable source, and every change is logged. Designed alongside Saudi lawyers, not retrofitted for them.

0.title: PDPL compliant
0.body: Data resident in the Kingdom, with role-based access and full deletion controls.

1.title: ZATCA-ready invoicing
1.body: VAT-compliant invoices with QR e-invoice format out of the box.

2.title: Source-linked answers
2.body: Every reply carries the article, statute, and year — verifiable in one click.

3.title: Full audit trail
3.body: Every prompt, output, and edit is logged. Export the matter and you have a complete record.

cta.title: Start with Mostashari today
cta.subtitle: Free 14-day trial. No card. Cancel anytime.

cta.title: Give your firm an AI-native operating system
cta.subtitle: Join the Saudi law firms running research, drafting, contract review, and client comms inside one bilingual workspace — grounded in Saudi statutes.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to your firm's private legal AI
howItWorks.subtitle: No installs, no fine-tuning, no IT project. Sign up, import, work.

1.title: Create your firm account
1.body: Sign up in under two minutes. We provision a private bilingual workspace, encrypted at rest, ready for your team.

2.title: Import your firm's content
2.body: Drop in templates, prior contracts, and active case files. The AI indexes everything privately to your tenant.

3.title: Start asking, drafting, reviewing
3.body: Talk to your firm's AI in Arabic or English. Every output is cited, version-tracked, and exportable.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Everything in Mostashari AI. Choose how you want to be billed.

features.research: Grounded legal research with Saudi citations

footer.rights: © {year} Legal AI OS — All rights reserved.

conversation.title: A real chat with your AI counsel
conversation.subtitle: Scroll to watch a typical drafting session unfold — exactly the way it feels in the dashboard.
conversation.msg1: Draft an NDA for a software vendor in Riyadh.
conversation.msg2: On it 👌  Saudi-jurisdiction NDA, 2-year confidentiality. Mutual or one-way?
conversation.msg4: Done. Cited Article 9, Anti-Commercial Fraud Law. Preview ready ↓

blurb1.title: Speak naturally
blurb1.body: Ask in plain Arabic or English. Mostashari understands intent — and asks the right follow-up before it acts. No prompt engineering, no boilerplate.

blurb2.title: Grounded in Saudi law
blurb2.body: Every reply carries its source — article, statute, year of issuance. The assistant cites the Companies Law, Labor Law, Civil Transactions Law and more so you can verify in one click.

blurb3.title: Iterate without losing context
blurb3.body: Add a clause, swap parties, change the term — the agent updates the draft in place, saves a new version, and remembers everything you've discussed in the thread.

blurb4.title: Negotiate confidently
blurb4.body: Compare against official templates or earlier drafts, surface the substantive deltas, and request counter-proposals — all without leaving the thread.

blurb5.title: Audit-ready exports
blurb5.body: Export digitally signed PDFs with a full change log and a citation manifest — ready for archiving, sharing, and audit by the bar association.

about.title: Building the future of legal work in the Kingdom
about.subtitle: Mostashari AI is a Saudi-built platform that combines deep legal expertise with state-of-the-art AI, giving every lawyer and law firm the tools to work faster, more accurately, and with confidence.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Mostashari AI started with a simple observation: lawyers in the Kingdom spend hours searching statutes, drafting contracts, and reviewing case files — work that AI built for the Saudi context can complete in minutes.
story.p2: We built Mostashari to be a legal counsel that understands the regulations, cites its sources, and respects client privacy. An assistant that frees lawyers from routine work so they can focus on what matters: their client, their case, their strategy.
story.p3: Today Mostashari is used by Saudi firms to research, draft, and review in minutes work that once took hours. Every reply is grounded in a real Saudi source, every draft is editable, every change is logged. The platform belongs to the firms that practise inside it.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Empower every Saudi lawyer to work with exceptional efficiency through a single workspace combining research, drafting, and review.

team.title: Our team
team.body: Lawyers and AI engineers working side by side — every feature is reviewed by counsel before it ships to you.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.body: Data stays inside the Kingdom, citations are always traceable, and privacy isn't a setting — it's the foundation.

trust.title: Traceable
trust.body: Every answer carries its source. No fabrication, no claims without evidence.

privacy.title: Private by design
privacy.body: Your firm's data is fully isolated. We don't share it and we don't train on it.

saudi.title: Saudi-first
saudi.body: Built from day one for Saudi regulations: Companies, Labor, Civil Transactions, and more.

speed.title: Fast
speed.body: What used to take hours now takes minutes. Your time is your firm's most valuable asset.

cta.title: Practising law in the Kingdom?
cta.subtitle: Start your free trial today and join the firms choosing to work smarter.

saudiCallout.title: Trained on Saudi law. Deployed inside Saudi borders.
saudiCallout.body: Every regulation, every court opinion, every commercial register entry our agent quotes comes from a verifiable Saudi source. Your data never leaves the region — and the entire pipeline is engineered to meet PDPL, ZATCA, and Vision-2030 cloud guidelines.

manifesto.quote: Lawyers should spend their time on judgment, strategy, and clients — not on chasing footnotes. Mostashari was built so the routine never owns your calendar again.

grounded.title: Grounded, not generative
grounded.body: Every claim cites an article, a statute, or a court opinion. If we can't trace it, we don't say it.

lawyerLed.title: Lawyer-led design
lawyerLed.body: Saudi counsel reviews every workflow before it ships. The product reflects how firms actually practise.

compliant.title: Compliant from day one
compliant.body: PDPL-compliant data handling, ZATCA-ready invoicing, and Saudi-resident infrastructure baked in.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.fieldAssigneeNoStaff: Add staff first to assign tasks

staff.title: Staff
staff.subtitle: Add your team. Anyone with a phone number is auto-added to your WhatsApp allowlist and pinged by the AI agent when a task is assigned to them.
staff.fieldPhoneHint: International format, e.g. 9665XXXXXXXX. Leave empty if they don't need WhatsApp pings.
staff.empty: No staff yet. Add the first member to start assigning tasks.

home.prompt: How can I help you today?

chips.draft: Draft a defense memo for me
chips.ask: What are the steps to incorporate a company?

feature.title: Your AI agent on WhatsApp
feature.subtitle: Pair your firm's number and train the agent to handle clients, gather case details, and book consultations automatically.

upload.title: Upload your file
upload.subtitle: Upload a legal document for analysis

create.title: Create a legal document
create.subtitle: Generate a new document with AI

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp agent
whatsapp.subtitle: Connect your number and train the agent

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp agent
whatsapp.subtitle: Connect your firm's WhatsApp number, then teach the agent what to say to clients and how to behave.
whatsapp.masterDisabled: Agent disabled — incoming messages will not be answered.

connection.title: Connection
connection.pairingHint: Open WhatsApp on your phone → Settings → Linked devices → Link a device, then scan the code.
connection.subscriptionRequired: An active subscription is required to connect WhatsApp.

behavior.title: Agent behavior
behavior.subtitle: Tell the agent who you are, how it should introduce itself, and how to handle clients.

firmDisplayName.label: Firm name the agent uses
firmDisplayName.help: How the agent introduces itself. Leave blank to use the default firm name.

welcomeAr.label: Welcome message (Arabic)
welcomeAr.placeholder: أهلًا بك في مكتب… كيف يمكنني مساعدتك؟
welcomeAr.help: Used only on the first reply to a new thread.

welcomeEn.label: Welcome message (English)
welcomeEn.placeholder: Welcome to … — how can I help today?
welcomeEn.help: Used only on the first reply to a new thread.

specialties.label: Firm specialties
specialties.placeholder: e.g. corporate disputes, commercial litigation, governance…
specialties.help: What your firm is great at, so the agent pitches it confidently.

consultationOffer.label: Consultation offer
consultationOffer.help: What the agent sells to a prospect. Don't include prices.

tone.label: Tone guidelines
tone.placeholder: e.g. friendly and concise, use Saudi Arabic, ask one question per message.

domains.label: Legal domains the agent handles
domains.help: Leave empty to handle all domains.

custom.label: Additional instructions
custom.placeholder: Anything the structured fields didn't cover. E.g. never quote fees, always ask for the case reference, escalate any urgent criminal matter.
custom.help: Injected verbatim into the agent's instructions.

preview.title: Preview instructions
preview.subtitle: See the full instructions the agent will read before replying to a client.

documents.title: Documents
documents.empty: You haven't uploaded any documents yet.
